sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89286" key="prosepifwne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-φωνέω</orth>, <sense id="n89286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">say besides, add</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg025:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Ma.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
